_comment: Which generation model per shot type. Higgsfield is the visual stack (pure AI). All 'chosen' fields are null until validated empirically at build time (build plan Section 6 + Section 11). Record findings in the 'notes' fields.
_status: TO VALIDATE at build time (Build D/E). Do not assume — test per shot type.

stills.notes: Generate the still frame, then animate it (see 'motion'). Or use direct text-to-video where a still is not needed.

motion.notes: Animate a still into a clip (image-to-video).

shot_type_overrides._comment: Per-shot-type model picks once tested (Section 11). null = use the default for that motion/stills role.

voice_tts.notes: Voice is AI-created, not cloned. Recipe-based for portability (Section 6).
